name: DASS-21
description: Depression Anxiety Stress Scales - 21 item version. Measures depression, anxiety, and stress levels.

questions.text: I found it hard to wind down

options.label: Did not apply to me at all
Applied to me to some degree
Applied to me a considerable degree
Applied to me very much

options.label: Did not apply to me at all
Applied to me to some degree
Applied to me a considerable degree
Applied to me very much
